graph_meta.title: Seed control-plane dependency graph
graph_meta.edge_direction_note: Edges point from downstream artifact to upstream artifact.

edge_type_catalog.meaning: Hard prerequisite. Downstream meaning or validity depends materially on the upstream artifact.
Downstream artifact is materially derived from the upstream artifact.
Upstream artifact defines the validator, fixture, or normative validation basis.
New artifact replaces an older artifact for downstream use.
Reference-only link. Helpful context, not a hard validity dependency.
